titleStmt.title: SII 23.159: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 159. (A.R. No. 159 of 1907.) Pēraiyūr, Tirumayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Nāganāthasvāmi temple—on the same wall Rājarāja III: year 20: 1235-36 A.D.

summary.p: This records an order of a sāmanta (feudal chief) of the king by name Mahāsāhāni Śatrugaṇḍa granting to the temple of Tirunāgēśvaram-uḍaiya-Nāyanār at Tirupperaiyūr, all the income (tēvai and taragu) like kaḍamai, antarāyam, śilvari, peruvari, kalavai, kāḍuveṭṭi (?) and muḍippoṉ accruing to him from Śēndamaṅgalam in Pērāyilnāḍu a division of Jayaśiṅgakulakāla-vaḷanāḍu, for the requirements of daily worship to the god.
Another inscription of three lines dated in the same year of the king which is unfinished is found engraved below the present one.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
. svasti śrī . tribhuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10vatu ma
ṉumakā cākāṇi Imayiccatturukaṇṭaṉ cāmantaṉ Olai tirupperaiyūr Uṭai
yār tiru nākiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyiṟ tevakaṉmi śrī māyesura kaṇkāṇi
śrī kāriyaṅ koyiṟkaṇakkaṟku Uṭaiyār tirunākiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku tiruppa
ṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭa vyañjaṉaṅkaḷukku jayaciṅkakulakāla vaḷanāṭṭup peru vāyil nāṭ
ṭu centamaṅkalattu kaṭamai Antarāyam cilvari peruvari nāṭu kalavai
kāṭuveṭṭi muṭippoṉ maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa tevai yun tarakun taraviṭṭu candrādi
tyavaṟ celvatāka kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom cāmantar Oppam Ivai teṉṉavaṉ bra
hmātarājaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai nirppaḻaṉiyuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
Āṟkaṇaṅkuṭaiyāṉ cempiyaṉ pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu ...
tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrīrājarāja devaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10vatu tiru
yapperumāḷāṉa nāṭaṉeṉ tirupperaiyil Uṭaiyār tirunāki
curamuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟkkuStops here.
Digital edition of SII 23.159 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
